arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Price revealed for cup-winning star as Arne Slot prepared to 'reluctantly' sell in summer window
arts.sum: Liverpool 'reluctantly' accept that they cannot keep cup-winning star at the club and are willing to do business in the summer.

arts.ttl: Ageless Salah remains driving force behind Liverpool quest for trophies
arts.sum: At 32 the striker is part of a new generation, powered by science and making a huge impact on the title race It takes a team to win trophies but it is quite useful to have an individual enjoy the season of their life. Mohamed Salah is that for Liverpool. Highlighting his importance to his side’s success is not exactly controversial but any praise is merited after driving his team into pole position as the business end approaches. Salah leads the Premier League scoring and creativity charts with 22 goals and 14 assists to put Liverpool clear at the top. On a difficult night at Goodison Park in midweek, he set up the opener before scoring in a game of few chances, the ninth time this season he has achieved such a feat. Sunday’s opponents Wolves will be well aware of his threat, although attempting to nullify him is more difficult. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot compares Mohamed Salah to Man United legend as Liverpool boss reveals the secret power that has given Anfield hero the edge over Premier League defences
arts.sum: At 32, Liverpool superstar Salah is a 'good age' with the physical capabilities of playing twice a week alongside the savvy gained from nearly 700 games in senior football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's referee comments shine new light on red card incident with Michael Oliver
arts.sum: During Liverpool boss Arne Slot's time in charge of Dutch giants Feyenoord, he earned a reputation - that he feels was strongly "exaggerated" by the media - for clashing with referees

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds after Everton made subtle dig at Liverpool before Michael Oliver controversy
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has given his opinions on Everton's match-day programme dig and late winner controversy against enraged Merseyside rivals Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Wolves - Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool's predicted starting XI vs Wolves in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to respond to more Michael Oliver VAR drama after Liverpool chaos
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arne Slot face FA charges after the Merseyside derby with referee Michael Oliver continuing Premier League duties this weekend

arts.ttl: Wolves honour headteacher for inspiring community
arts.sum: The headteacher's impact stretches beyond the classroom, as she tirelessly works to create opportunities for young people to thrive, both academically and through sport, which is why she was named as Wolverhampton Wanderers' Community Captain by the Wolves Foundation . She helped bring a range of sports to OLSC, including handball, basketball, and judo, and now works closely with the Foundation to run the Premier League Inspires programme, which uses football to help young people develop personal skills and positive attitudes for further education and employment.

arts.ttl: Liverpool face major Ibrahima Konate transfer decision despite 'dream' statement
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate says that he is loving life at Liverpool but having entered the final 18 months of his contract the Anfield hierarchy will need to act quick to secure his long-term future

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush: Liverpool fans left fuming after Man City star's stunning Newcastle hattrick
arts.sum: New Manchester City signing Omar Marmoush has officially announced himself to the Premier League with a sensational 14-minute hattrick. Liverpool fans left FUMING after stunning Marmoush hattrick for Man City
